meta.title: Press – Back to Meaning Maximization
meta.description: Press information and materials for editorial teams about Back to Meaning Maximization – the cooperative economic alternative from Freiburg.

hero.untertitel: Information and materials for editorial teams

kurzprofil.beschreibung: [PLACEHOLDER] Back to Meaning Maximization is a cooperatively organized economic alternative that combines equal-value work, shared infrastructure, and international collaboration within a common system.

gleichwuerdig.text: Every hour counts equally – regardless of qualification.

infrastruktur.text: Costs are shared, not borne alone.

international.text: Decentralized cells under a common system.

kontakt.name: [PLACEHOLDER]
kontakt.hinweis: We usually respond within 2 business days.
